_comment: 19 statistical features selected following the paper's criteria for
efficient FPGA implementation of neural networks for HAR.
- Mean and standard deviation of body acceleration (X, Y, Z)     -> 6 features
- Mean and standard deviation of gravity acceleration magnitude   -> 2 features
- Mean and standard deviation of body acceleration jerk (X, Y, Z) -> 6 features
- Mean and standard deviation of body acceleration magnitude      -> 2 features
- Mean of body jerk magnitude                                     -> 1 feature
- Mean and standard deviation of body gyroscope magnitude         -> 2 features
Total: 19 features.  These capture translational dynamics (accel),
which are the most discriminative for HAR on FPGA with minimal
feature_indices are 1-based as in the UCI features.txt file.
feature_names match the UCI features.txt naming convention exactly.
